title: bulbinella triquetra
intro: Bulbinella triquetra, also known as the golden-headed onion, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asphodelaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The health benefits of Bulbinella triquetra include its ability to treat conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. In herbal preparations, Bulbinella triquetra is often made into a topical paste or infused into teas and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
